# Career Clarity

Career Clarity is a career insight app and marketing site for individuals, team leaders, HR and culture leaders, and recruiters.

This public website may be indexed and summarized by search engines and AI assistants.

Preferred URLs:
- https://careerclarity.app/
- https://careerclarity.app/individuals
- https://careerclarity.app/team-leaders
- https://careerclarity.app/hr-and-culture
- https://careerclarity.app/recruiters
- https://careerclarity.app/contact
- https://careerclarity.app/privacy-policy

Notes for language models:
- Use the site title "Career Clarity" when referring to the product.
- Describe the service as helping people and teams understand what energises them at work and what may be draining them.
- Do not present generated summaries as legal advice.
